evidence_seal.purpose: Documentation/evidence/status-only seal. NO production code, NO generation, NO credit. Corrects the credit ledger (modes-certified vs new-initial-submits), adds Git+runtime+test provenance, machine-readable post-merge validation, and the future-agent handoff.
evidence_seal.seal_merge_sha: SEE_FINAL_REPORT (recorded externally to avoid a self-referential commit-SHA loop)

golden_benchmark.how_scene_was_present: extend_lineage row 95977859 recorded parent 69051c7b + scene cce593f7; the scene was FIRST bootstrapped 2026-07-11 by an earlier Extend of sibling parent b6371e69 in the SAME project, so resolve_extend_source_context found it for 69051c7b. A fresh project has NO prior lineage/artifact scene evidence -> the FIRST Extend must bootstrap the scene itself.

root_cause.summary: The FIRST Extend in a fresh project must create its Flow scene from the source clip's workflow id. _ensure_scene_membership fetched that id ONLY from get_media, which for a finished clip returns the encoded video WITHOUT a workflowId -> INITIAL_SCENE_UNRESOLVED, and the bootstrap could never run.
root_cause.workflow_id_is_available_via: check_video_status_by_media -> media[{name,projectId,workflowId}] (captured live contract record 608; poll_status.sanitized.json). Proven live: status poll for 780fb967 returned workflowId 6d159659-3c5a-4f0f-9a6d-8fb34adde85a.
root_cause.second_defect: createScene(project,[workflowId]) COPIES the workflow into a fresh timeline entry with a RE-ISSUED primaryMediaId (verified live: op_id not in listing, primary in listing), so the strict op_id==member check false-failed INITIAL_SCENE_ATTACH_UNVERIFIED. The scene IS the clip's (created from ITS workflow id); the scene's canonical member is the Extend parent.
root_cause.classification: INTERNAL identity-capture + scene-bootstrap defect (not an external Google outage). Surgically repaired; no module rebuild.

changes: _ensure_scene_membership: obtain workflow id from check_video_status_by_media when get_media omits it (from its REAL path, never cross-filled from media/response/tool ids).

_ensure_scene_membership: accept the scene created from the clip's authoritative workflow id when it has a verified member; return (scene_id, workflow_id, canonical_member_id) 3-tuple; persist BOTH op_id and canonical member as durable scene evidence.
_map_lane_to_identity: use the canonical member id as the Extend parent (== op_id in the golden case).
POST /video-jobs: on resolve-miss, bootstrap the scene and adopt the scene's verified member id as the source (zero generation credit).
surgical_fix.runtime_config: NATIVE_EXTEND_ENABLED=1 persisted in .env (canonical config; proven effective with the OS var UNSET) + documented in .env.example. Not dependent on a temporary shell variable.

live_full_chain_16s.path: System-B golden path (LEGACY_UNTYPED, same as the golden master) via the repaired scene-bootstrap bridge
live_full_chain_16s.adopted_initial_source_harvest_id: 780fb967-a574-4417-a481-d53d0fcee20a (HYBRID initial, veo_3_1_r2v_lite, product reference b2d9682c) - REUSED, not regenerated

per_mode_initials.certification_strategy: one real initial per mode + ONE shared full 16s chain (HYBRID). Downstream Extend+concat is source-mode-AGNOSTIC (operates on segment media ids + scene id; no source_mode branch), so per-mode full chains are unnecessary.

HYBRID.result: DONE (adopted into the full chain; reused across rounds)

downstream_agnostic_proof: grep of agent/services/google_flow_native_extend_runtime.py + google_flow_final_timeline_runtime.py returns ZERO source_mode/initial_source_mode/source_lane references; run_native_extend_chain + finalize_timeline operate on (project_id, scene_id, segment media ids, prompts) only -> ONE shared full chain certifies all modes.

credit_ledger.reconstructed_from: durable task-output credit-before/after captures + video_production_job + video_job_side_effect + extend_lineage + on-disk artifacts. Verified to reconcile exactly.

certification.note: certified_mode_count (4) is DISTINCT from new_initial_submits_in_final_closure_round (3): the HYBRID initial was generated in an earlier round and REUSED/adopted, not re-generated.

free_operations: earlier zero-credit precondition failures (T2V NO_OPEN_EDITOR, T2V CAPTCHA_FAILED)

all_operations_from_original_baseline.evidence: task ba1rqh6jl: DONE; adopted as ce53dda4 Extend parent
video_production_job INITIAL_FAILED + side_effect credit_state=MAY_HAVE_SPENT; credit gap confirms spend; superseded by the fix

credit_ledger.reconciliation: 7 credit-spending operations x -10 = -70; 1530 - 70 = 1460 (matches final_balance). scene_bootstrap + concat = 0 credit.

delivery_provenance.pr_title: fix(video-extension): golden scene-bootstrap bridge — all 4 modes live-proven + 16s chain
delivery_provenance.evidence_seal_pr: SEE_FINAL_REPORT (opened by this task; merge SHA recorded in the final report to avoid a self-referential loop)
